title: Quick World Settings
description: You can easily change the time, weather, and night vision settings!
body:
## A simple utility mod that lets you quickly change the time, weather, and night vision settings.

## Supported Languages
- English (en_us)
- Japanese (ja_jp) [Note: Japanese is only available in version 1.2.1 and later.]

## Known Issues
- In v26.1.2: The feature that locks the time may not work properly.

## Requirements
- Fabric API (Required only for Fabric/Quilt versions)


![Settings screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/332b8c196524ef855765f1b7f9784c81567fdd21.png)

## How to Use
- Press the U key to make it morning.
- Press the I key to make it daytime.
- Press the O key to make it nighttime.
- Press the P key to open the settings screen.

| Version | Fabric | Forge | NeoForge | Quilt |
| :--- | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| 26.1.2 | -- | -- | v1.2.1 | -- |

| 1.18.2 | -- | v1.0.0 | -- | -- |

## Update Details (v1.2.0)
New features have been added:
- Fixed time settings
- Toggle night vision on/off
- Weather control
- Improved settings screen UI
